page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: PANDASEQ is a program to align Illumina reads, optionally with PCR primers embedded in the sequence, and reconstruct an overlapping sequence.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Paired-end Assembler for DNA sequences (PANDAseq) is a program to align Illumina reads, optionally with PCR primers embedded in the sequence, and reconstruct an overlapping sequence.
